There are a lot of delegates at stake, and if we play our cards right, we can continue to compete against President Trump through to the nomination. But to do that we need your help. subject: How Ivanka Trump and W-GDP helped 12 million women in one year
body:
This month marks one year since President Trump launched the Women’s Global Development and Prosperity Initiative, also known as W-GDP. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=51a1af72eb&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • February 12, 2020
---
| | |
# **How Ivanka Trump and W-GDP helped 12 million women in one year**

**This month marks** one year since President Trump launched the Women’s Global Development and Prosperity Initiative, also known as W-GDP. With major support from Ivanka Trump, W-GDP addresses the lack of economic freedom that women face globally.

**The idea is simple** : When women are economically empowered, they reinvest that wealth in their families and communities. The ripple effect spurs more inclusive growth still—and often brings peace and stability with it.

[WATCH: Ivanka Trump explains the importance of W-GDP](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=87ffef2376&e=3ee4985eea)

**W-GDP****’s ambitious goal** is to help 50 million women in the developing world by 2025. Under Ivanka Trump’s leadership, 12 million women have been served in year one alone.

**Ms. Trump celebrated** that achievement today at the State Department. Whereas past presidents have talked a big game about women’s empowerment, she said, the [Trump Administration is delivering](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=26ec68245e&e=3ee4985eea). “This White House looks forward to working closely with Congress in passing W-GDP legislation and realizing this long-overdue goal.”

**Joining her** were a pair of lawmakers, were a pair of lawmakers, Sens. Lindsey Graham (R-SC) and Jeanne Shaheen (D-NH), who are leading a [bipartisan charge to do just that.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cc6926409c&e=3ee4985eea)

[How W-GDP will lift 50 million women by 2025](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=913cc0bc04&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬****WATCH:** [1 year of W-GDP, as told by Ivanka Trump](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=14c956f3fe&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Once again, President Trump puts veterans FIRST**

**President Trump** took a major step yesterday to support veterans and military spouses by signing the Supporting Veterans in STEM Careers Act.

**🎥****President Trump:** [“This has been long in the making.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=89ce724be9&e=3ee4985eea)

**“It’s a big deal,”** the President said from the Oval Office. “The bill directs the National Science Foundation to work with other federal agencies to expand veteran eligibility for STEM-related programs and encourages veteran participation in these critical fields.”

**The** **Trump Administration** has made caring for our brave veterans a top priority:
* **With VA accountability** , over 8,000 underperforming staffers have been replaced by workers who will treat our veterans better. Before President Trump, there was no strong mechanism to punish bad employees and reward great ones.

* **With the VA Mission Act,** veterans are able to find the best healthcare options available for them—whether it be at VA facilities or community providers.

* **With a booming economy,** the veteran unemployment rate has hit a _record_ low, and veteran homelessness has dropped by more than 5 percent.

[America’s vets are our top priority, and it will stay that way!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=17bab3b67e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

---
|
---
| **President Trump signs the Supporting Veterans in STEM Careers Act** | February 11, 2020

Door to door canvassing is the best way to activate Oregonians for the May primary. Never done it before? That's great! So many of our supporters are first time volunteers. There's no better time than now to join the team and talk with voters. Join us this weekend in Eugene and Corvallis.
---
|
---
Dear supporters, Signs of spring are here - daffodils, birdsong, and other reminders that our election is now only 97 days away! We will win or lose based on the work we put in over the coming weeks. If there's anything you are holding back for "later," know that now is the time to pitch in. We need your donations, we need you on the doors, we need your public support on social media, and we need you to activate your community. We're building a movement that can't be bought, and every action you take matters in the march toward victory. Thank you for all you're already doing. Let's win this. Onward, Doyle
---

[The Register-Guard](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6QA/ni0YAA/t.2z8/qRdIi5cmQ1u3dhI6fOUcww/h3/9Keqjt2rNZ2OQD7Ygf3GCNJ17KhjkUCVUNxILqlweBVRndr1-2FqmpU1VxhNDSqQYA-2BVkHYkmah9PX3o8wFhom-2BtmkaOZDmCKwcr9tj0vg0IRaH5bq7AD0rbuXn7R2oYuc9M-2BSXKQba9obloe263Hg-2BV1KBCIHSIiFOgUwP4Qt8py3qIL6BGtIhWGhXBp1Pkn4Y4XFWs03SWcRjuRvxue6bWZeUcQLh-2FZAeWTcpScXvsS4UNk4rsa-2FUUtazUG-2FpkA-2BjT4xBSxdOIEYNR9SllvsSX2aAluCYe0dgeTwOrDCrH68FQCmWAvizFLouLbCoRHVfODs374kRdhZLbF3C-2FNkPMFZEtWkCbQnu7MNMvp9O60CWXbOx9OKl3LSxxba3vlJlXezrhYDEZjPQsfghEp2G6d3F3UZgwtWFnnSRxJf1ViVJ7CwXQb1nP5tF0Pzz6jwVbkUDabjxZHig3k2vrUG0Xw7KRb-2F64wJvrxjM-2BL5r5Y-3D/J63G) **Justice Through Doyle Canning for Congress** "It has been over a year since news broke that ICE is detaining children at the border and keeping them in cages. There are still children and parents locked up and dying due to the unconscionable conditions in their cells. We must make a stand and push to end not only this inexcusable practice but the many racist and also bi-partisan policies underlying our current immigration and prison systems. Doyle Canning is the only candidate running for Congress in Oregon that I trust to fight tirelessly to bring justice to the border and our incarceration system. It also has been over 50 years since scientists began warning us about the dangers inherent to an economy predicated on the burning of fossil fuels. Though there have been steps taken in the interim to mitigate our dependence on fossil fuels and dampen the associated consequences, they pale in comparison to the massive bootprints left by the greenhouse effect, ocean acidification, and mass species extinction. Doyle has proven through a history of organizing and advocacy for environmental justice that she is the right person to take the helm in these dark times." - Calvin Burke, Eugene Oregon

As the first Democratic woman ever to run in Oregon's 4th district, Doyle joins Kate and Julia as a special guest. Tune in for an entertaining interview that includes Doyle explaining Oregon to New Yorkers, sharing the urgency of the housing crisis, and stan-ing for trees as part of the climate solutions we need now. Listen wherever you get your podcasts!

**Please join Doyle in Oakland, California**** with hosts Wahleah Johns and Billy Parish. **Wahleah was recently featured in the [New York Times](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6QA/ni0YAA/t.2z8/qRdIi5cmQ1u3dhI6fOUcww/h9/Gu1vL9uwvF4VU6LHVOeHT-2FYUrZhNMUmd8RxkXupBjejouWFIa0bVF0hQovL6P6UyYAFHSp-2F8shxISbKp3m0psd-2BUFXmmR2ekPRTEBKpzpURbIayptBmRy1URn6St9f2I7fJD5gBbMXXfY4Gnp-2BrgDns1bGmry2PoQpyC46M-2B3qIV9xh9Ab-2Bh-2FMdGSZEYjD4ryRYBSde-2FZJQyWsh-2FkPi8YrWwnbRxNX7ZBJTCI1KjbnUTToNa7Fxq-2Fhq0FGmtG2-2Brmhx9VM6EYEIJYoT9KpC-2B3tovW5SIl6ZJzQjTNWN9Gvq2uIgxrQLi4f4GLbIIc9ceOCrTV2NjMcYxDMg2k1C5vIPxYK6KvOf6ZJUfPVHxTyI-3D/N-5u) for her work to bring solar power to 15,000 families currency living without electricity in the Navajo Nation. clean_body: | | | | Door to door canvassing is the best way to activate Oregonians for the May primary. Never done it before? That's great! So many of our supporters are first time volunteers. There's no better time than now to join the team and talk with voters. Join us this weekend in Eugene and Corvallis. | Dear supporters, Signs of spring are here - daffodils, birdsong, and other reminders that our election is now only 97 days away! We will win or lose based on the work we put in over the coming weeks. If there's anything you are holding back for "later," know that now is the time to pitch in. We need your donations, we need you on the doors, we need your public support on social media, and we need you to activate your community. We're building a movement that can't be bought, and every action you take matters in the march toward victory. Thank you for all you're already doing. Let's win this. Onward, Doyle | IN THE NEWS... Justice Through Doyle Canning for Congress "It has been over a year since news broke that ICE is detaining children at the border and keeping them in cages. There are still children and parents locked up and dying due to the unconscionable conditions in their cells. We must make a stand and push to end not only this inexcusable practice but the many racist and also bi-partisan policies underlying our current immigration and prison systems. Doyle Canning is the only candidate running for Congress in Oregon that I trust to fight tirelessly to bring justice to the border and our incarceration system. It also has been over 50 years since scientists began warning us about the dangers inherent to an economy predicated on the burning of fossil fuels. Though there have been steps taken in the interim to mitigate our dependence on fossil fuels and dampen the associated consequences, they pale in comparison to the massive bootprints left by the greenhouse effect, ocean acidification, and mass species extinction. Doyle has proven through a history of organizing and advocacy for environmental justice that she is the right person to take the helm in these dark times." - Calvin Burke, Eugene Oregon BERNIE AND BEYOND WITH CONGRESSIONAL CANDIDATE DOYLE CANNING Reply Guys is the leftist, feminist, comedy podcast for the rest of us hosted by Julia Claire (Bridgetown Comedy Festival, SiriusXM) and Kate Willett (Netflix, ). As the first Democratic woman ever to run in Oregon's 4th district, Doyle joins Kate and Julia as a special guest. Tune in for an entertaining interview that includes Doyle explaining Oregon to New Yorkers, sharing the urgency of the housing crisis, and stan-ing for trees as part of the climate solutions we need now. Listen wherever you get your podcasts! | ANNOUNCEMENTS Canning for Congress is hitting the road with fundraisers from San Francisco to Seattle. Spread the word! | Please join Doyle in San Francisco, California with special guest, District Attorney Chesa Boudin! Chesa was elected on a platform to fundamentally change the criminal justice system and address racism in policing and prosecution. He built a victorious grassroots movement that stunned the establishment. We're doing the same. | Please join Doyle in Oakland, California with hosts Wahleah Johns and Billy Parish. Wahleah was recently featured in the for her work to bring solar power to 15,000 families currency living without electricity in the Navajo Nation. Billy is co-founder and CEO of Mosaic Inc., the largest residential solar lender in the U.S. You'll get to hear from them about why they support our campaign, and the work we're doing in Oregon to win a Green New Deal. An expanding Oakland host committee will make this event massive and memorable. | Join Doyle in Seattle with special guests Brady Piñero Walkinshaw and Anthony Rodgers-Wright! is a force in Seattle progressive politics who is a dedicated defender of our climate. Anthony is a champion for climate justice and has been called both There's more in store with an excellent co-hosting committee for our evening in the Emerald City. Join us! | Join us for the first Candidate Forum of the election, focused on climate and environmental justice. Doyle will take the stage and take your questions! *** Feb 20th at 7PM United Methodist Church * | | FLORENCE MEET & GREET, FEB 15 Join us for our first Meet and Greet in Florence! We are in for a great time at Old Town Coffee Roasters. | HOUSE PARTY IN PORTLAND FEB 16 Join us in Portland for a fun event to meet Doyle and learn about her vision for Oregon and the country! | FELLOWSHIPS! JOIN THE TEAM Your movement, your campaign, join our fellowship program today! Our Fellowship program serves two purposes: to elect new leadership in Oregon 04, and to train new leaders in electoral politics. Fellows join a scrappy network of passionate grassroots leaders. The program is open to all ages! | UPCOMING EVENTS Join us as we call our neighbors to chat with them about the election and spread the word about Doyle! Free pizza will be provided. Join us at our campaign HQ as we go door to door across Eugene to help get the word out about Doyle and make sure people are register as Democrat! h Join us at our campaign HQ as we go door to door across Eugene to help get the word out about Doyle and make sure people are register as Democrat! Join us for our first Meet and Greet in Florence! We are in for a great time at Old Town Coffee Roasters. Join us for a fun afternoon in West Linn to meet Doyle Canning and get an inside look at the campaign. Two parties in one day! Join us in Portland for a fun House Party to meet Doyle and learn about her vision for Oregon and the country! | YES WE CAN...** | Farmers for Canning, Coming Soon! We enjoyed a tour of the regenerative agriculture operation in Creswell run by three brothers who raise buffalo, apples, hazelnuts, and pork. They are heading up a farmer roundtable to discuss the Green New Deal for farmers. Let us know if you're a farmer who wants to join our Farmers for Canning organizing! | House Parties Are Always Happening. One of the best ways to support the campaign is to throw a party! We have a skilled team to help you handle all of the details - it's easy, fun, and powerful. If you want to host, Email brennan@canningforcongress.com. | The UNICORNS Are Registering Voters Have you ever wanted to experience the joy of seeing a unicorn? Now you can! Students for Canning have brought in the Unicorns to help register voters! They are active at UO and may be coming to a campus near you soon... | Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! "Donate to Doyle Canning" | | | Sent Via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Canning For Congress 2020, please .

name: Team Bloomberg 2020
subject: SHARE: Mike's Reproductive Rights Record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
When it comes to reproductive freedom, Mike will get it done.

| [](www.facebook.com/watch/?v=1274963932714447) We know that reproductive rights are under attack under this president -- Trump has nominated over 100 judges who are hostile toward reproductive rights. Today, while Congress held a hearing called, “Protecting Women’s Access to Reproductive Care,” Mike released his plan to expand and safeguard access to reproductive services, affordable birth control, and protect reproductive freedom. Mike has spent nearly two decades supporting women’s reproductive rights spanning his time as mayor of New York City and his commitments as a philanthropist. In fact, he stated almost 15 years ago that, “reproductive freedom is a fundamental human right, and we can never take it for granted.” We need a president who will safeguard these rights right now and for generations to come. **We’re sharing more about Mike’s record on protecting reproductive freedom for everyone, and you can join in:** [**Share Mike’s record on expanding and protecting reproductive rights with your friends and family on Facebook today.**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=11914f3b95f7454389a769dc666ff95f&_e=uoQHpnKDmMTJ1bXtdENihHm9B9tuzXkV_ODTfF_-ppjS4ie97BVNyBtjb9ke2ILe5li4aP3F145geoHmrnAYZrj5-UM_apT3dIwcTgZenxdfep7RL7lnyoPUiTG7jXdeFZsomhWvV7gX35dgDqv5OFXvxGNyGjvIuymH1s5UwoDNoQX395SKiBwDRze4KFBTFHyGwid_MfsqFOiAUMHKzjqJfKcEo8y6P-grUa9SSbOOl--MRktmR92bKDgkwhmV3Dzf5SyLTyuHQGUfBLWYVJgGb4VEeDkgAsWzdhUfsXA%3D) Thanks, Team Bloomberg 2020 | [SHARE »](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=11914f3b95f7454389a769dc666ff95f&_e=uoQHpnKDmMTJ1bXtdENihHm9B9tuzXkV_ODTfF_-ppjS4ie97BVNyBtjb9ke2ILe5li4aP3F145geoHmrnAYZqBErIWENtgLHiyhVyma6yB8E0YmJppIvZfTAtlS4611h5JJBXRThohi5mZinQTQPV1PRvfXFaaFbdRD5MM_I8nPjujHJaM7uAeEIygJTve51yjS_UIOvjs3He__6e_rLUPqA0VgpMv3nt8XqCJJGcQYlCGX2mUXIQOyIM3EJC_5d0UplzTkE6Y5A4AiYIGxqPdc5DXagydjP_t6Ym9a-K0%3D)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: If you can, please make a donation to help pave the path to victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
As a member of this team, you deserve to know exactly where things stand right now. So I'm going to level with you: We've already raised more than $5 million since Iowa. Woo-hoo! I'm so grateful... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ae75/45c30650/1f905c7eb/66e550d8/1403291600/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

As a member of this team, you deserve to know exactly where things stand right now.

So I'm going to level with you:

* **We've already raised more than $5 million since Iowa.** Woo-hoo! I'm so grateful for the support of this grassroots team.

* But our movement needs **critical funds so I can remain competitive in this race through Super Tuesday.** That's when _a third of the delegates will be decided_ -- so what we do now matters more than ever.

* **We're setting an ambitious goal of raising $7 million before the Nevada caucuses next week.** Now, this is our biggest goal yet and will make February our biggest fundraising month ever -- but I believe this grassroots movement can do it.

If you've been sitting on the sidelines, now's the time to jump in the fight. And here's the thing: We saw a big increase in first-time donors yesterday -- so that means people ARE getting off the sidelines. And now's the perfect time to join them.

**[Please contribute $2 or whatever you can right now so we can reach this ambitious $7 million goal and continue to grow our movement.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ae75/45c30650/1f905c7eb/66e550db/1403291600/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItanVuZTIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTzY3Rl9FR0xfTEFVX0VfMjAyMDAyMTJfVjFTMl9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-june2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO67F_EGL_LAU_E_20200212_V1S2_P_T1")**

I'm so grateful... | | | "" As a member of this team, you deserve to know exactly where things stand right now. So I'm going to level with you: We've already raised more than $5 million since Iowa. Woo-hoo! I'm so grateful for the support of this grassroots team. But our movement needs critical funds so I can remain competitive in this race through Super Tuesday. That's when a third of the delegates will be decided -- so what we do now matters more than ever. We're setting an ambitious goal of raising $7 million before the Nevada caucuses next week. Now, this is our biggest goal yet and will make February our biggest fundraising month ever -- but I believe this grassroots movement can do it. If you've been sitting on the sidelines, now's the time to jump in the fight. And here's the thing: We saw a big increase in first-time donors yesterday -- so that means people ARE getting off the sidelines. And now's the perfect time to join them. name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Your Team Fitz Campaign Update
body:
No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-e-njuvn-ahkdjtlkr-o/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-njuvn-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Peter,While Washington, D.C. has been going further and further into the insanity of partisanship and impeachment over the last few months, it's been such a relief to spend my time instead with the people of Southeast Wisconsin.**Here are some of the highlights from the campaign trail:** Winter really arrived in full force here in Wisconsin, just in time for the 35th annual Waukesha JanBoree! It was great to check out the week-long festivities and speak with lots of Waukesha-area residents over a beer in the beer garden or a hot chocolate around the fire. This is just one example of all the great events that are happening in the 5th. I also recently got to attend the Wauwatosa Chamber of Commerce Annual Showcase and Social. We kicked off 2020 in back at home in Hustisford, at the 55th annual "Toilet Bowl" Classic. It may have a funny name, but it's a fantastic Dodge County community tradition and proceeds always benefit a good cause. We've also had lots of great opportunities to cheer on the Badgers with family and friends. This holiday season I got to help out the Juneau Lions Club and the Salvation Army by doing some bell ringing at my hometown Piggly Wiggly, and helping out at the mobile food pantry in Oconomowoc held by Feeding America and Molina Healthcare. It was wonderful to see the generosity of the people of Wisconsin, especially around the holidays. Some of the most fun events on the campaign trail have been the parades in communities all over the 5th, from Waukesha to Menomonee Falls to Germantown to Hartford, and the list goes on! With all of these parades to walk in, it's a good thing that I've also been able to attend dozens of pancake breakfasts, fish fries, spaghetti dinners, and chili cook-offs in communities all over Wisconsin. We've enjoyed American Legion breakfasts in Kewaskum and Palmyra, a Knights of Columbus breakfast in Fort Atkinson, pancakes with fire departments in Jefferson and Ashippun, chili cook-offs in Rubicon and Waukesha, and fish fries in Oconomowoc and Wauwatosa. I've even joked with my staff that this campaign is becoming the Man vs. Food tour! One of the things I've been so grateful to see on this campaign has been the level of support from our generous donors at EVERY level.From donors who maxed out their support at the very start, to surprise contributions from people on fixed incomes, who chipped in because they know this race is important to our country and wanted to make sure they were involved.If you want to join us, or if you have already donated but want to keep us motivated and moving at campaign events like the ones above, click the button below! [Join Team Fitz](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-njuvn-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Support Team Fitz](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-njuvn-ahkdjtlkr-j/) And with so many more events to come, I look forward to seeing you on the trail! Thanks again!Scott Fitzgerald
## **Join The Fight**
• Receive Campaign Updates
• Volunteer
• Invite Your Friends
## **Support President Trump**
• Scott Fitzgerald was one of the earliest and most loyal Trump supporters in Wisconsin.
• President Trump needs allies like Scott Fitzgerald in Washington.
## **Forward and Share**
• Forward This Email To Friends
• Facebook: FitzgeraldForWI
• Twitter: FitzgeraldForWI | [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-njuvn-ahkdjtlkr-t/)| [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-njuvn-ahkdjtlkr-i/)| [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-njuvn-ahkdjtlkr-u/)
---|---|---
**If you would like to mail in a contribution, please make checks payable and mail to:**
Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
PO Box 102
Juneau, WI 53039
[Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-njuvn-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-b) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-u-njuvn-ahkdjtlkr-n/)

name: Wendy
subject: Need your help with this FEC deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
Here's why it matters...
Friend, everyone is talking about how much our race in Texas matters. POLITICO is calling it one of the biggest of the cycle. **And at midnight tonight, we have a huge FEC filing deadline - but we're falling $1,480 short of our goal.**
My opponent, Chip Roy, has got deep-pocket lobbyists and corporate PACs on his side, and that's why it's going to take every ounce of fight - _everything_ we've got - to win this thing. But I'm not counting on special interests to help me hit these goals. I've got this grassroots team, and together, I know we can do it.
FEC filings are our greatest shot at showing the strength of this campaign - and as one of the most high-profile House races, all eyes will be on us. So I'm personally asking you to help our campaign make up this shortfall: **Will you give $3 or more right now, before our crucial FEC deadline, to flip Texas blue and expand our House majority?**
We have just hours left to hit our goal, so here's the best link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk78-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**
Thank you,
Wendy

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a20/704929dc/162b7ff5/3993bd94/2443405936/VEsE/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a20/704929dc/162b7ff5/3993bd97/2443405936/VEsF/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a20/704929dc/162b7ff5/3993bd96/2443405936/VEsC/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")
Wendy Davis for Congress
3112 Windsor Rd. Ste A #525
Austin, TX 78703
Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
---

Friend, What happened during Tuesday night's Democrat Primary in New Hampshire should terrify us all. The Democrats voted for Bernie Sanders, a devout socialist who wants to replace our American system with a socialist system; The same system that has lead to extreme poverty, starvation, and even death around the world. Bernie knows firsthand the suffering that socialism brings. He [spent a 10-day 'honeymoon' in the Soviet Union](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/UL4E3o8y0BczCC2vzI59dg/PrckrspJucD8922892wUXu9M8A), and fell in love with it - a love he brought back to America, and one that has fueled his politics ever since. **That 's the new Democrat Party: a party of all-out, unapologetic socialists!** [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/tReBeVOCc7GTI2BeTWpN5Q/PrckrspJucD8922892wUXu9M8A) This November's election isn't about Republican v.s. Democrat. It's about voting to preserve our American way of life v.s. voting for a dangerous ideology that will decimate jobs, destroy our quality of life, and force a big government-mandated shared misery around the country. On the campaign trail, I've been speaking out against the rising tide of socialism in America. What once seemed like a distant threat is now at our doorstep! **If we don 't take action soon, socialism will be the new normal. Are we okay with that?** [Friend, join me in my fight against the Socialist Left by chipping in right now!](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/tReBeVOCc7GTI2BeTWpN5Q/PrckrspJucD8922892wUXu9M8A) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/tReBeVOCc7GTI2BeTWpN5Q/PrckrspJucD8922892wUXu9M8A) **The horrors of socialism are too great to allow.[Help me ensure its defeat by taking action now!](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/tReBeVOCc7GTI2BeTWpN5Q/PrckrspJucD8922892wUXu9M8A)** Thank you, Terry Neese

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Fentanyl is a Killer
body:
We must never give up No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhjdtrtl-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjdtrtl-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjdtrtl-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Fentanyl is a Killer](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjdtrtl-kujkulhluu-j/)
The good news is drug overdose deaths in the United States are down over the last year. The bad news is that there are still far too many. In this week's blog, I discuss what Congress is doing to help fight the opioid epidemic, specifically targeting fentanyl. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjdtrtl-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjdtrtl-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Four Days in February](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjdtrtl-kujkulhluu-d/)
Super Bowl Sunday, confusion in Iowa on Monday, State of the Union on Tuesday and today, Wednesday, President Trump will be acquitted! In this week's blog, I discuss this week's more interesting moments. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjdtrtl-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjdtrtl-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Hundreds of Thousands of Marchers - Ignored Again](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjdtrtl-kujkulhluu-u/)
Last Friday, hundreds of thousands of people of all ages gathered in Washington, D.C. for the 2020 March for Life. It was an inspiring event and in fact, one of my favorite events of the year. In this week's blog, I discuss the march and make the case for why this event should no longer be ignored by the mainstream press. Little lives do matter! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjdtrtl-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjdtrtl-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [There's More Going on Than Impeachment](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjdtrtl-kujkulhluu-n/)
While most of the mainstream press has obsessed the past week about impeachment, President Trump just had two great victories that will greatly impact our economy. In this week's blog I discuss these developments and provide irrefutable evidence President Trump continues to achieve monumental results for the American people. name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: Saying a prayer tonight
body:
Please forgive this late night intrusion but I wanted to share some quick thoughts about today. Spending time tonight with my family and preparing... |
---
| |
---
| Hoosier Republican,

Please forgive this late night intrusion but I wanted to share some quick thoughts about today. Spending time tonight with my family and preparing to put my kids to bed, my mind can’t help but take me to the ceremony that occurred today in South Bend. This afternoon the remains of 2,411 precious unborn souls were finally and properly put to rest. A grotesque story was given a beautiful and deserving ending.

Tonight, I’ll say a prayer for those who were so casually discarded, those babies whose passions and dreams were snuffed out before they could even begin. I’ll also say a prayer of thanks for those Hoosiers who attended the ceremony, representing all of us who know life is a precious gift from above.

Thank you and God bless,

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party
---
|
---

name: Latinos for Trump
subject: Help Latinos for Trump FIGHT socialism!
body:
Hispanic Voters Are The Key! Dear Fellow Conservative, If you’re not worried about the 2020 presidential election, you should be... If we lose a sing
| |
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=203836.1623.1.af5fceaf6cd3e852fadb6d89a30d6335) |
---
## Hispanic Voters Are The Key!
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, If you’re not worried about the 2020 presidential election, you should be... If we lose a single battleground state that we won in 2016, then we can say goodbye to the White House. And the Democrats know it. That’s why the Democrats have employed the failed governor candidate, Democrat and socialist Andrew Gillum to recruit one million “disenfranchised Hispanic” voters to turn Florida blue – forever. To make matters worse, the most recent polls have both Texas and Florida voting for the Democrats in 2020. So if you don’t want to see our country turn into another socialist hellhole like Venezuela, and you don’t want to give up your guns, lose your Constitutional rights, or see an open, lawless border, you need to help us stop the Democrats today. The time to take our country back is today, because if we wait until tomorrow, it may be too late – and I hope that isn’t a risk you want to take. When we reach out through the tight-knit Latino communities and share the truth about the Democrats, they share the information to their children and families, at the workplace, and even at church. Before we started employing the Democrat’s strategies against them, certain Hispanic districts were guaranteed to vote blue, every single election season, it wasn’t even close. Republicans wouldn’t even bother visiting these districts because they already considered them lost. When we endorsed Fred Rangel in the district Hillary carried by 70%, our work narrowed the margin from 70% to 16%, and today it would be even higher. When Jaimy Blanco ran for city council in Pasadena, TX, a Democrat district since the 1980’s, we cut the margin so far that we only lost by 29 mail in votes that came in LATE! Hispanic voters are going to be the key element in the 2020 race. But until now, the Republican Party has all but ignored these voters. Latino Americans share the same conservative values that you and I do. It’s time we get them on board and take them back from the Democrats and their divisive lies. Our President and our country’s future depend on it. Please do not wait. The Democrats have been infiltrating Hispanic communities for years, and many would-be Hispanic voters don’t even know that there is another option. If we’re going to take our country back, we have to do it right now.
---
## Our only hope is to get out and engage our Hispanic Americans at the very foundations of their tight-knit communities.
---
**Will you take a stand for your country today to keep the United States from falling alongside every other failed socialist disaster?** **Please consider donating TODAY to help us meet our engagement and outreach goals!** **$35 can help our volunteers reach thousands of unregistered Hispanic voters and register the to vote.** **A larger gift of $50 can help us target these hotspots of unregistered voters with carefully tailored radio advertisements on Hispanic radio channels.** **$100 can help us reach deeper into the Hispanic community and ensure a conservative future for generations.**
---

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: It's time to investigate Hunter Biden and Burisma
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JkAylngOpnUnynajHCsrjd7cLIlmnSbuj-1sEzvqOsURILswpb2iphDVcp34Q5ICz2LN4ojpdQQqVGso27TeI0TfXcVZnmjbqIHU2sVZ4Zc7IC_HkLs3tNJnCEMcfFnJ6PXdqgnE1oFs0nyiO5R0bFn11h_yV8xJbRXeq0LWwJbrhHDQRVmO5w==&c=o2VCNIGeo4_nhyEROf0fjvNepbJksiLzt1vtrExaeJQkQdNbBqndgA==&ch=I-SYII-xjFm_NalBY70QdOudqfWpfgk7LVkhBpZCi9-WYUR0ymkgHA==)
---
| Patriot,
When President Trump took office, he made it a goal to drain the swamp. Whether here in Washington, D.C. or abroad with our allies, I stand with the President to finally get rid of shady politicians and end corrupt business deals.
While his father was Vice President, Hunter Biden was elected and got paid millions of dollars to sit on the board of Burisma Holdings, a Ukrainian gas company with ties to corrupt Ukrainian politicians. Sound corrupt? It is. I lay out the whole story here:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JkAylngOpnUnynajHCsrjd7cLIlmnSbuj-1sEzvqOsURILswpb2iphDVcp34Q5ICz2LN4ojpdQQqVGso27TeI0TfXcVZnmjbqIHU2sVZ4Zc7IC_HkLs3tNJnCEMcfFnJ6PXdqgnE1oFs0nyiO5R0bFn11h_yV8xJbRXeq0LWwJbrhHDQRVmO5w==&c=o2VCNIGeo4_nhyEROf0fjvNepbJksiLzt1vtrExaeJQkQdNbBqndgA==&ch=I-SYII-xjFm_NalBY70QdOudqfWpfgk7LVkhBpZCi9-WYUR0ymkgHA==)
---
| | | [DRAIN THE SWAMP](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JkAylngOpnUnynajHCsrjd7cLIlmnSbuj-1sEzvqOsURILswpb2iphDVcp34Q5ICz2LN4ojpdQQqVGso27TeI0TfXcVZnmjbqIHU2sVZ4Zc7IC_HkLs3tNJnCEMcfFnJ6PXdqgnE1oFs0nyiO5R0bFn11h_yV8xJbRXeq0LWwJbrhHDQRVmO5w==&c=o2VCNIGeo4_nhyEROf0fjvNepbJksiLzt1vtrExaeJQkQdNbBqndgA==&ch=I-SYII-xjFm_NalBY70QdOudqfWpfgk7LVkhBpZCi9-WYUR0ymkgHA==)
---
| There are serious questions about Hunter Biden and Burisma that need to be answered. Join me in demanding that no one be held above the law!
---
| | | [INVESTIGATE THE BIDENS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JkAylngOpnUnynajHCsrjd7cLIlmnSbuj-1sEzvqOsURILswpb2iphDVcp34Q5ICz2LN4ojpdQQqVGso27TeI0TfXcVZnmjbqIHU2sVZ4Zc7IC_HkLs3tNJnCEMcfFnJ6PXdqgnE1oFs0nyiO5R0bFn11h_yV8xJbRXeq0LWwJbrhHDQRVmO5w==&c=o2VCNIGeo4_nhyEROf0fjvNepbJksiLzt1vtrExaeJQkQdNbBqndgA==&ch=I-SYII-xjFm_NalBY70QdOudqfWpfgk7LVkhBpZCi9-WYUR0ymkgHA==)

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Patriot, When President Trump took office, he made it a goal to drain the swamp. Whether here in Washington, D.C. or abroad with our allies, I stand with the President to finally get rid of shady politicians and end corrupt business deals. While his father was Vice President, Hunter Biden was elected and got paid millions of dollars to sit on the board of Burisma Holdings, a Ukrainian gas company with ties to corrupt Ukrainian politicians. Sound corrupt? It is. I lay out the whole story here: | == | | | == | There are serious questions about Hunter Biden and Burisma that need to be answered. Join me in demanding that no one be held above the law! | | | == | I want to thank you for your continued support during this unprecedented time in our country's history. Together, we'll KEEP AMERICA GREAT in 2020 and beyond. | | | God bless America, | == | Matt Gaetz | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2020 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: Marie Harf, Serve America PAC
subject: The Serve America Victory Fund is back!
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14956237/157384978/-631061264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTBhNjYyNi02YjRlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nR8_fHwm41vgzfhv4sk42kpPi9UlrR5iE6edciymYmw=&emci=e9a6dd95-6a4e-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=2e0a6626-6b4e-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=194769) Friend One of the ways we made a huge impact together in 2018 was through the Serve America Victory Fund, which marshaled much-needed resources for our endorsed House candidates and helped so many military veterans flip seats from red to blue. Since then, those Serve America-endorsed candidates—now Members of Congress—have served as a critical check on Donald Trump and promoted a positive agenda for our country’s future. To build on that success in 2019, we have exciting news to share with you today: **the Serve America Victory Fund is back for 2020!** Last month, when Seth and our team relaunched the Serve America PAC, we endorsed nine new House candidates—all impressive, inspiring leaders with military backgrounds serving our country. This cycle, we know we need to keep the House blue and expand our majority. These nine candidates—and more endorsees to come—will help us do exactly that. And the Victory Fund is the best way to support this group of patriotic Americans who want to make Washington work better. [**Will you make a contribution today to the Serve America Victory Fund to support these candidates and help us build the infrastructure for these candidates that we’re going to need in 2020?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14956238/157384979/-403937030?refcode=20200213_SM_SAVF-launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTBhNjYyNi02YjRlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nR8_fHwm41vgzfhv4sk42kpPi9UlrR5iE6edciymYmw=) People recognize the impact Serve America is having. The Boston Globe wrote: “Political courage is too rare a thing. If we want more people of courage in Congress, it makes sense to look among those who have already exhibited it, who have already given ample proof of their character and their core values. During the last election cycle, Serve America PAC put money and mentoring behind a group of military and national security veterans running for Congress. The turnaround House class of 2018—with 21 Serve America-backed candidates—has shown the wisdom of that unlikely search for political unicorns.” [**Help us build our team and our resources by making a contribution to the Serve America Victory Fund so that we can secure and expand our Democratic majority in the House in 2020.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14956239/157384980/-403937030?refcode=20200213_SM_SAVF-launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTBhNjYyNi02YjRlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nR8_fHwm41vgzfhv4sk42kpPi9UlrR5iE6edciymYmw=) We can’t do this without you. I’m grateful for everything you do. -Marie Marie Harf
Executive Director
Serve America PAC [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14956240/157384981/1338765119?refcode=20200213_SM_SAVF-launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTBhNjYyNi02YjRlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nR8_fHwm41vgzfhv4sk42kpPi9UlrR5iE6edciymYmw=) name: Rick Kennedy
subject: Early Voting Starts in Five Days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14959634/157416924/-1907457918?refcode=01202020_em_hdr&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2Q4NjQ5ZS03NjRlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NP8c1EaKrKSZInkEpquNGX12xdgsJ4tl38H1k-qj-Ig=)
---
Dear Friend, The last five days have been a whirlwind of events across the district. I think my car is dead. I can't emphasize enough how the feel of this race has changed in the last couple of weeks. I'm more convinced than ever that the two and a half years of work we've done to position ourselves for this moment can, and will, pay off with a victory in November. But job one is still getting through the primary. Our internal polling indicates we are in _very_ good shape with decided voters, but there are still too many undecideds to take anything for granted. I'm asking for one last push to get us through the primary with 50% +1 vote. We're poised to expand our digital billboard campaign and get on the airwaves. Peter,
We need your help reaching our $3,000 goal tonight so we can help our Veterans and Military Families Caucus pay for yard signs. We have $1,800 left to raise and we’re hoping to finish before midnight.
After Marsha Blackburn’s repeated disrespect of Lt. Col. Vindman, we wanted to make a statement showing that Tennessee Democrats value those who serve this country and their families. The initial printing of these yard signs ran out quickly, and we want to help make more.

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Why I'm endorsing this Senate candidate
body:
I wanted to quickly tell you why...

Peter,

I wanted to quickly tell you why I'm supporting Bill Hagerty for U.S. Senate in Tennessee:

Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man.

Will you stand with me and donate to Bill Hagerty right now?

STAND WITH ME - DONATE TO BILL HAGERTY

DONATE $25 RIGHT NOW [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/djtjr-endorsement?amount=25&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donjr%202] DONATE $50 RIGHT NOW [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/djtjr-endorsement?amount=50&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donjr%202] DONATE $100 RIGHT NOW [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/djtjr-endorsement?amount=100&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donjr%202] DONATE $200 RIGHT NOW [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/djtjr-endorsement?amount=200&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donjr%202] DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/djtjr-endorsement?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donjr%202]

My Dad needs people like Bill Hagerty to be in there, and to support him - he can’t do it alone.

Let’s make sure to get this man in the United States Senate. Please donate right now. [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/djtjr-endorsement?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donjr%202]

Thank you for your time.

Donald Trump Jr.

body:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: Some big personal news
body:
My new show, Spicer and Co. March 3 at 6p on Newsmax. | |
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1a76b9d8f9&e=f6564bbe3b) | [Tweet](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=75cbdc9de9&e=f6564bbe3b)
---|---
| | [](http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e402bad743&e=f6564bbe3b) | [Forward](http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e402bad743&e=f6564bbe3b)
---|---
|
---
| | My new show, “Spicer & Co,’’ is a cable news program, debuting Tuesday, March 3, at 6 pm ET and will air daily Monday through Friday on Newsmax TV, America’s fastest-growing cable news network. Broadcasting from Washington, D.C., “Spicer & Co’’ in studios not far from the White House, I will lead an ensemble of Washington insiders, experts, journalists and power brokers to analyze the day’s top headlines from the Beltway and the key news from the U.S. and the world. I want to offer viewers a unique perspective and insights into what’s really happening, who is up, who’s down and most importantly how it’s going to affect their lives. I’ve had a front row seat to to how Washington works at the highest levels– in the White House, Congress, the Pentagon and K Street. We are going to invite our viewers into a conversation that is totally unique. We will ask the questions and cover the topics that everyone in America is thinking about but no one is asking or talking about.
---
|
---
| | We've got a great team for "Spicer & Co." and I can't wait for everyone to see what we've been working on. So on Tuesday, March 3, I hope you will tune in and set your DVR to record the show.

Follow along on social media ([Instagram](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c403f9dafb&e=f6564bbe3b) and [Twitter](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=303f588160&e=f6564bbe3b)) to get a behind the scenes look at everything we're working on.
---
| Thanks,

_Sean_

It’s considered one of our top opportunities to pick up a seat in the House and build a bluer Texas in 2020. We’ve endorsed Kim Olson—a retired Colonel in the US Air Force with proven leadership experience and a legacy of service. Kim was one of the first women to fly and instruct in fighter-type aircraft, command an operational flying squadron, lead in multiple combat zones, and rise to the rank of Colonel. Kim is running for Congress to bring honest leadership and continue her service to Texans—and she's our best shot at flipping the seat in Texas' 24th district. **Yesterday, Donald Trump endorsed Kim’s Republican opponent Beth Van Duyne. He’s helping her raise a ton of money right now, and we need your help to respond.[ Can you split a donation between Kim Olson’s campaign and the Serve America Victory Fund, which endorsed Kim and other veterans like her? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14966617/157473817/-86875321?refcode=20200213_SA_OlsonRR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTg2OGQ1Ni04YjRlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-vJON4JZMHsixGpuQOJcGAQVRG3csmrXoPH8aZIxq5Q=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14966618/157473818/131213193?refcode=20200213_SA_OlsonRR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTg2OGQ1Ni04YjRlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-vJON4JZMHsixGpuQOJcGAQVRG3csmrXoPH8aZIxq5Q=) Trump is directly invoking veterans to justify his support of Beth Van Duyne—a candidate whose idea of keeping people safe is spreading racist anti-immigration rhetoric while Colonel Kim Olson served our nation in uniform for 28 years and fought for the dignity of veterans once they returned home through her non-profit work once they return home. name: Charles Booker
subject: I am writing to ask for your personal endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
I am writing today to personally ask for your endorsement. Please let me explain why this is so important.
#
I am writing today to personally ask for your endorsement. Let me tell you why.
We aren’t up against any old senator. We are running to defeat Mitch McConnell. The only way is through a _true_ grassroots movement the likes of which we haven’t seen in a long time.
We’re going to need the people demanding a Green New Deal to stop the destruction of our planet. We need the college grad worried about paying back student loans. We’ll need the mother who lost a son to drug addiction while pharmaceutical CEOs cashed checks. Everybody in, no one left out.
**We need you in with us too. It’s the only way to beat Mitch.**
[**So will you personally endorse our campaign for U.S. Senate today? Add your name to say you support our effort, especially today as we’re just beginning our campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14967869/157489259/-432699747?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWM2NjI3Yy05MTRlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uAU1bQmeOGXmKMcgEk1EuHJ6IztRt0N5uHrFBy7IX6E=&emci=a704a101-754e-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=01c6627c-914e-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=2635570)
**[Sign your name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14967870/157489260/-432699747?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWM2NjI3Yy05MTRlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uAU1bQmeOGXmKMcgEk1EuHJ6IztRt0N5uHrFBy7IX6E=&emci=a704a101-754e-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=01c6627c-914e-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=2635570)**
Look, it may be my name on the ballot in November, but I want to make something clear. I am not the alternative to Mitch McConnell. WE are.
Whether or not we succeed in November all comes down to how many people we can bring in to this process. That’s why I’m emailing today, asking you to be on that list of first endorsers.
[**Please sign your name to endorse our campaign for U.S. Senate now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14967871/157489261/-432699747?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWM2NjI3Yy05MTRlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uAU1bQmeOGXmKMcgEk1EuHJ6IztRt0N5uHrFBy7IX6E=&emci=a704a101-754e-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=01c6627c-914e-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=2635570)
Together we can build an unstoppable movement that won’t just replace Mitch McConnell, but change this state and this country for the better.
Thank you,
Charles Booker

clean_body: I am writing today to personally ask for your endorsement. Please let me explain why this is so important. I am writing today to personally ask for your endorsement. Let me tell you why. We aren’t up against any old senator. We are running to defeat Mitch McConnell. The only way is through a true grassroots movement the likes of which we haven’t seen in a long time. We’re going to need the people demanding a Green New Deal to stop the destruction of our planet. We need the college grad worried about paying back student loans. We’ll need the mother who lost a son to drug addiction while pharmaceutical CEOs cashed checks. Everybody in, no one left out. We need you in with us too. It’s the only way to beat Mitch. Look, it may be my name on the ballot in November, but I want to make something clear. I am not the alternative to Mitch McConnell. WE are. Whether or not we succeed in November all comes down to how many people we can bring in to this process. That’s why I’m emailing today, asking you to be on that list of first endorsers. Together we can build an unstoppable movement that won’t just replace Mitch McConnell, but change this state and this country for the better. Thank you, Charles Booker = | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: I know what it takes Peter
body:
| | Peter, After working for two years in the White House as the White House Press Secretary and dealing with the media on a 24-hour basis, I can tell you misinformation is real, and it’s a real problem. Bad information informs people to make bad decisions. Americans have a responsibility to protect the freedom of the press and freedom of speech, but it doesn’t mean the media has the freedom to fabricate stories to drive ratings. We’re quickly approaching the 2020 elections, and the noise from the media is only increasing. With that comes our responsibility to do our homework, learn about the candidates, understand the issues, and learn the truth. **If we want the values of religious freedom, marriage and family, and the sanctity of life to win at the polls in November, we can’t leave it up to the media to inform voters - especially people of faith.** In 2016, I witnessed the remarkable power of the Christian vote. Millions turned out to vote for candidates who stood for biblical ideals - in the face of oppositional media working overtime to promote candidates with secular policies. **And I know this happened in large part because My Faith Votes made it their mission to motivate, equip and inspire believers to bring their values to the polls./strong >** An astounding 85 percent of Christians reached by My Faith Votes turned out to vote their values in 2016 – far above the national average of 55 percent. And truly, the thanks goes to you. **[When you support My Faith Votes, you make it possible to inform and activate believers in all 50 states across the nation to protect our beliefs](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200213apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200213apl01nd&n=1).** The battle is only going to intensify in the coming months, and the strategy My Faith Votes has devised to get Christians to the polls again in 2020 is exactly what it will take to ensure our faith is protected. Many people have asked me if I became discouraged by the constant confrontation of misinformation. And my answer is always the same, I have tremendous hope because I believe in you - and the millions of other faith-driven Americans in our country who seek out truth. I’ve been a part of politics long enough to know what it will take for our biblical values to prevail in November - it will require the Christian vote. That’s why my dad (Gov. Mike Huckabee) and I are standing with My Faith Votes and encouraging others to do the same. **[Please make a donation to My Faith Votes](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200213apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200213apl01nd&n=2).** Help them start 2020 strong so that they can hit the ground running, executing on their carefully designed strategy to engage the Christian voters. This is some of the most important work happening in our nation. [](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200213apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200213apl01nd&n=3) Standing with you,

Sarah Huckabee Sanders
Former White House Press Secretary
---
* * *
You subscribed [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

[Update Subscription Preferences or Unsubscribe](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200213apl01nd&n=4)

© 2020 My Faith Votes, 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134, United States
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200213apl01nd&n=5) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200213apl01nd&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200213apl01nd&n=7)

Peter,
Maine.
My birthplace. The state I was raised in and have lived in my entire life. The place I am proud to call home.... is now the focus of the entire nation.
**You see, all eyes are on Maine because the balance of the Senate rests on what happens in Maine in November.**
And, Peter, I can tell you this: I've never experienced a campaign anything like what this one is shaping out to be. The distortions and outright lies being told by the far left are relentless.
Peter, I've never been one to sit out a fight, and I'm certainly not going to sit by and watch my campaign be defamed. But, I can't do this alone.
**I need YOUR help to fight back and ensure I can win this race.**
I'm hopeful to activate 250 donors by the end of the week to stand with me in this fight. No donation is too small -- every dollar donated to my campaign will instantly go toward our efforts to spread the truth about my record and ensure we are victorious in November.
_**Will you stand with me and become one of the 250 donors I need?**_

Thanks for all you do,
Susan

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Iowa and New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

We’re now through two primary states, and there’s a few figures that keep
jumping out at me. In Iowa, turnout barely kept pace with 2016 levels. And
although New Hampshire had a strong showing Tuesday night, turnout is
still lower across the board than many had hoped for.

Which means that at this pivotal time and moment with Donald Trump in the
White House, people are staying home. They’re tired. Scared. Heartbroken.
I feel all those things and more. But we cannot allow them to define us,
nor can we give in to despair.

That’s one of the reasons why we started our new grassroots organization,
Powered By People: to help bring new voters into the process, and remind
folks that politics should be fun, engaging, and aspirational. That when
enough of us band together, we can achieve great things.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42283?refcode=ema20200213-79369&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=79369%2E444211%2Eu-_ouG ]Today, I’m personally asking you to make a donation to fuel our
efforts. This is a defining moment for our country, and we’ll need an
incredible deal of resources to sustain this level of nationwide
organizing.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42283?refcode=ema20200213-79369&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=79369%2E444211%2Eu-_ouG ]Donate

Together, we’re going to continue to build this powerful, inspiring,
widespread organization. We’ll knock on doors, make calls, and have the
face-to-face conversations needed to build a lasting movement. And through
it all, I promise you, we’ll have plenty of fun while we’re at it.

Thanks for all you do.
I’m really looking forward to working with you.

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42283?refcode=ema20200213-79369&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=79369%2E444211%2Eu-_ouG ]Donate

clean_body: [1]Powered By People We’re now through two primary states, and there’s a few figures that keep jumping out at me. In Iowa, turnout barely kept pace with 2016 levels. And although New Hampshire had a strong showing Tuesday night, turnout is still lower across the board than many had hoped for. Which means that at this pivotal time and moment with Donald Trump in the White House, people are staying home. They’re tired. Scared. Heartbroken. I feel all those things and more. But we cannot allow them to define us, nor can we give in to despair. That’s one of the reasons why we started our new grassroots organization, Powered By People: to help bring new voters into the process, and remind folks that politics should be fun, engaging, and aspirational. That when enough of us band together, we can achieve great things. [ ]Today, I’m personally asking you to make a donation to fuel our efforts. This is a defining moment for our country, and we’ll need an incredible deal of resources to sustain this level of nationwide organizing. [ ]Donate Together, we’re going to continue to build this powerful, inspiring, widespread organization. We’ll knock on doors, make calls, and have the face-to-face conversations needed to build a lasting movement. And through it all, I promise you, we’ll have plenty of fun while we’re at it. Thanks for all you do. I’m really looking forward to working with you. Beto [ ]Donate

You're an extremely important member of this team, so we want to touch base with you about where we're at as a grassroots movement.

**In this email, we're going to be transparent about the funds that Elizabeth needs this team to raise this month to remain competitive in this race.** A third of delegates don't get decided until Super Tuesday -- and what we do from now until then will determine our performance.

**We've set an ambitious goal of raising $7 million before the Nevada caucuses next week.** That's what it's going to take to fund two important things ahead of Super Tuesday: critical organizing on the ground and getting our message out on TV, on the radio, and online.

**[If you've been waiting for the right moment to support Elizabeth-- now's the time. Can you chip in $2 or anything you can right now to hit this critical goal and help Elizabeth stay competitive?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852afac/45c30650/1feec2673/66e5457d/1305559245/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItanVuZTIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTzY4Rl9FR0xfTEFVX1FfMjAyMDAyMTNfVjFTM19QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-june2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO68F_EGL_LAU_Q_20200213_V1S3_P_T1")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
Now, this goal is higher than we've ever set before, and will set us up for our biggest month of fundraising yet. But Elizabeth believes in this grassroots movement to her core, and we know we can meet the moment.

If this were a traditional campaign, Elizabeth would be spending every day between now and our goal deadline flying from big city to big city holding fancy fundraisers with wealthy donors and making her case to fill our campaign coffers.

But that's not the campaign she's running. This campaign is 100% grassroots-funded -- and our whole organization runs on small-dollar donations. No selling time to wealthy donors in wine caves and penthouses -- just regular people like us chipping in when we can.

**So if you want to see Elizabeth Warren remain competitive in this race, she needs your help right now. This is an ambitious goal, and we can only hit it if this grassroots team steps up and meets the challenge. We saw an increase in first-time donors yesterday -- and we really need to keep that momentum going in order to hit this important goal.**

**[Can Elizabeth count on your first donation of $2 or anything you can contribute today to hit this goal and power our campaign through Super Tuesday and beyond?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852afac/45c30650/1feec2673/66e5457d/1305559245/VEsEDA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItanVuZTIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTzY4Rl9FR0xfTEFVX1FfMjAyMDAyMTNfVjFTM19QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-june2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO68F_EGL_LAU_Q_20200213_V1S3_P_T1")**

This is our moment. Let's do this.

Thanks for all that you do,

Team Warren

subject: Sanctuary Cities Undermine the Law
body:
"On Jan, 6, 2020, 92-year-old Maria Fuentes was raped and murdered by Reeaz Khan, a 21-year-old illegal immigrant in New York City. But this ..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2911a0fc46&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Sanctuary Cities Undermine the Law**

“On Jan, 6, 2020, 92-year-old Maria Fuentes was raped and murdered by Reeaz Khan, a 21-year-old illegal immigrant in New York City. But this tragedy was entirely preventable,” Scott Brady, a U.S. Attorney in Pennsylvania, writes in the _Pittsburgh Tribune-Review_.

“In fact, Khan should have been in custody at the time because six weeks earlier Khan was jailed and arrested for domestic violence charges. Because he was in the country illegally, U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) filed a detainer that requested that the jail give ICE prior notice and the opportunity to detain Khan before the jail released him. Rather than honoring this request, New York officials released Khan. Had they honored the detainer, Ms. Fuentes might still be alive today.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=85a6dacf11&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Two senators — one Republican and one Democrat — are leading a legislative effort to have a global women’s initiative spearheaded by President Donald Trump’s daughter Ivanka written into law . . . [The bill] would make the economic empowerment of women a priority of U.S. foreign policy,” Darlene Superville reports for [_The Associated Press_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=540a1c8d24&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “More than 100,000 people are expected to pack into the world's biggest cricket stadium later this month when it is formally opened during a visit to India by US President Donald Trump . . . Trump is due for a two-day visit to India on February 24, and Prime Minister Narendra Modi wants to host him in his home state of Gujarat,” [_AFP_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=24db6dff59&e=3ee4985eea) reports.
---
|
---
| “An anti-Trump activist intentionally drove his van into a Republican voter-registration tent in Florida this weekend, nearly killing a half-dozen GOP volunteers. Yet amazingly, _Politico_ did not touch the story of this near-fatal, politically motivated attack on Republicans until the state GOP promised to retaliate—at the polls,” Becket Adams writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=92cb20b98e&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Why I'd rather block walk than talk to donors...
body:
https://youtu.be/oWa89H2sB7o?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=809054b67a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_13_12_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-809054b67a-32267927

Marc Flores block walking in CD TX-18.

"Language really doesn't matter...the issues are the same."

Good morning Peter,
One of my favorite parts about running for office has been block walking. I have always enjoyed block walking - getting to meet my neighbors and discuss important issues - and this campaign has given me many opportunities to do so.

When I talk with voters, I find we often have to work to find common ground. But whether they are voting for a different candidate or a different party, I find they are almost always willing to have a conversation with me, and discuss what concerns them.

I am stimulated by these conversations; I am driven by the passion of people I meet. As I have said many times throughout the campaign, I am driven by the people of my district, and by the desire to meet their needs.
http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=809054b67a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_13_12_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-809054b67a-32267927
As the primary election draws near, I want to spend every second of my time out block walking, and not talking on the phone or holding exclusive dinners to raise funds. In order to do this, I need your support. It has been small contributions from supporters like you that has kept this campaign moving forward.

If you chip in $5 today (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=809054b67a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_13_12_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-809054b67a-32267927) , my team of block walkers and I can continue to be out in the community, hearing from voters, and telling them how together, we can do better. Please, donate today (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=809054b67a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_13_12_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-809054b67a-32267927) to become a part of the movement.

clean_body: Marc Flores block walking in CD TX-18. "Language really doesn't matter...the issues are the same." Good morning Peter, One of my favorite parts about running for office has been block walking. I have always enjoyed block walking - getting to meet my neighbors and discuss important issues - and this campaign has given me many opportunities to do so. When I talk with voters, I find we often have to work to find common ground. But whether they are voting for a different candidate or a different party, I find they are almost always willing to have a conversation with me, and discuss what concerns them. I am stimulated by these conversations; I am driven by the passion of people I meet. As I have said many times throughout the campaign, I am driven by the people of my district, and by the desire to meet their needs. As the primary election draws near, I want to spend every second of my time out block walking, and not talking on the phone or holding exclusive dinners to raise funds. In order to do this, I need your support. It has been small contributions from supporters like you that has kept this campaign moving forward. If you chip in $5 today () , my team of block walkers and I can continue to be out in the community, hearing from voters, and telling them how together, we can do better. Please, donate today () to become a part of the movement. Express Donate: $5 () Express Donate: $10 () Express Donate: $25 () Or, donate another amount () Thank you for your support, and I'll see you on the campaign trail! Marc ============================================================ Facebook () Twitter () Instagram () Website () Copyright © 2020 Marc Flores for Congress, All rights reserved.

subject: The terrible, horrible, no good, very bad Supreme Court decision

| | As our presidential primary season starts to achieve liftoff, one thing is clear: The Democratic candidates are ALL more popular than Donald Trump. But make no mistake, Trump's allies are lining up to support him. In an article called "The Billion-Dollar Disinformation Campaign to Reelect the President", _The Atlantic_ magazine notes that **Trump "will be aided by a vast coalition of partisan media, outside political groups, and enterprising freelance operatives."** The Supreme Court decision that makes that possible? _Citizens United._ It's one of the most misguided and corrosive decisions in our nation's history, leading to big corporations using secret money to fund misleading disinformation campaigns. I've proposed a constitutional amendment to overturn Citizens United. Now, I need your help building the grassroots movement to pass it when we take back the U.S. Senate. [**Sign the petition to support a constitutional amendment overturning**** _Citizens United_****!**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f626/6cd27893/531f0107/15865bdd/756735024/VEsE/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://petitions.signforgood.com/OverturnCitizensUnited/?code=Merkley&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-jeff-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2020-01-overturncitizensunited-email-2%26amount%3D%7B%7Bask%7D%7D%26noskip%3Dtrue%26recurring%3D1") We're joined by a huge coalition of grassroots organizations and progressive champions in the Senate and House. name: Jason Leviskas
subject: Oberweis for Congress: Weekend of Action Saturday & Sunday
body:
Greetings Friends and Supporters !

We have another "Weekend of Action" planned for this weekend. Lots of doors to hit all over the district. If you can make it out to 1 of our 3 walks we have organized, please let us know!

Saturday February 15th: 12:30 pm to 4pm.
Walk#1)
We will be gathering at the St.Charles Campaign office (1700 Lincoln Hwy, Ste J St.Charles, IL) at 12:30pm to hit the streets and knock on doors, place yard signs, and speak to people about Oberweis for Congress.

Walk #2)
We will be gathering at the Crystal Lake Campaign office ( 6500 Northwest Highway suite 8, Crystal Lake, IL / McHenry Co GOP Office ) at 12:30pm to hit the streets and knock on doors, place yard signs, and speak to people about Oberweis for Congress.

Sunday February 16th: 1:00 pm to 4pm.
We will be gathering at the Gyorgos Cafe ( 7233 State Park Rd, Fox Lake, IL 60020 ) at 1:00pm to hit the streets and knock on doors, place yard signs, and speak to people about Oberweis for Congress.

Let us know if you can make it !

Also the latest from JIM2020.com
<https://chicago.suntimes.com/2020/2/13/21131444/endorsement-jim-oberweis-congress-14th-district-2020-republican-primary-election-house-rep>

Vote by Mail Information
<https://jim2020.com/vote-by-mail/>

Early voting has started, get out and vote today!

We look forward to seeing everyone this weekend,

#TEAM OBERWEIS

He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? **[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6c8/18e32a7f/51e873c1/7b22425c/1708106460/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6c8/18e32a7f/51e873c1/7b22425d/1708106460/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails")

If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand.
Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6c8/18e32a7f/51e873c1/7b224252/1708106460/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

Big news, Peter:

**Thanks to supporters like you, we just launched our first TV ad of the campaign!** But Texas is a BIG state -- and that makes it expensive to air ads here. **[That's why we're asking you to contribute to our Texas Airwaves Fund to make sure we can keep our ad on the air>>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905d6/7f51f7bc/4d263012/4ef1b22a/595362597/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkxNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txairwavesfund?refcode=email_20200213.1nd__917__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

When Texas voters get to know MJ and hear about her platform of acting on climate change, ending gun violence, and protecting health care, they want to support her. And she's already traveled thousands of miles to meet Texans from Houston to El Paso.

TV and digital ads will help us tell MJ's story, share her platform, and show why **she's the candidate who can beat Sen. Cornyn. Can you pitch in to our Texas Airwaves Fund? Even $5 can make a big difference.**
