name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Steve King only values women for their ability to give birth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14977179/157576812/-2077934265?refcode=em20_200213_stevekingrr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTJkNTFmYy1iNTRlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u2zOhG1JreZsLKI8L2CGSyVbSpQ7sBxVranjzAM3xyg=)
---
Peter,

Today, the House of Representatives moved one step closer to ratifying the Equal Rights Amendment.

**Not only did Steve King vote NO on this resolution, but he justified his decision by saying, “There’s really no rights that women don’t have that men have.”**

Here are the facts, Steve: In 2020, a white woman earns 79 cents for every dollar a man earns. A Hispanic woman earns only 54 cents for that dollar. Women still face pregnancy discrimination that forces them out of the workplace. Their rights to make their own healthcare decisions are still up for debate, and they continue to face sexual harassment, exploitation, and violence.

**It’s clear Steve King only values women for their ability to give birth.** He couldn’t be more wrong; women are essential to the success of our state and our country. We won’t stop working until women have full legal and lived equality under the law.

**[Today he’s proved (once again) that he is unfit for office. He doesn’t represent us -- it’s time for a change. Make a donation right now and help us defeat Steve King.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14977180/157576813/-2077934265?refcode=em20_200213_stevekingrr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTJkNTFmYy1iNTRlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u2zOhG1JreZsLKI8L2CGSyVbSpQ7sBxVranjzAM3xyg=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, Today, the House of Representatives moved one step closer to ratifying the Equal Rights Amendment. Not only did Steve King vote NO on this resolution, but he justified his decision by saying, “There’s really no rights that women don’t have that men have.” Here are the facts, Steve: In 2020, a white woman earns 79 cents for every dollar a man earns. A Hispanic woman earns only 54 cents for that dollar. Women still face pregnancy discrimination that forces them out of the workplace. Their rights to make their own healthcare decisions are still up for debate, and they continue to face sexual harassment, exploitation, and violence. It’s clear Steve King only values women for their ability to give birth. He couldn’t be more wrong; women are essential to the success of our state and our country. We won’t stop working until women have full legal and lived equality under the law. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We need to stand up for women’s rights and for each and every one of the 380,000 women and girls in Iowa’s 4th district. Standing Tall for All, \-- J.D. =

name: Peters, Gary
subject: Trump's 2020 budget proposal would cut trillions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
Donald Trump was born with a silver spoon in his mouth
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da816/5721a3ed/70d06e3d/efb029e/4190867225/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friend: This week, we got a hold of President Trump's 2020 budget proposal, and it's worse than we thought. This budget would cut billions - yes, billions - of dollars from Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid. Trump doubled down on these proposed cuts just a couple weeks ago, threatening to cut these vital programs.

Donald Trump was born with a silver spoon in his mouth, and he may think it's easy to rob billions of dollars in vital services from the elderly and vulnerable - but you know what's not so easy? Trying to make a limited income last through medical expenses, heating costs and groceries. Or worrying about how you'll put food on the table for your child and pay for their hospital bills.

These are experiences that Donald Trump has never had to face, but it's reality for many Michiganders and Americans. So let me say this as plainly as possible: I will fight any and every attempt to take away Social Security and Medicare.

But in the face of these proposed cuts from President Trump - and similar moves from Mitch McConnell and Republican senators - I need you to join me in protecting these crucial services. [**Will you add your name to my petition now to oppose GOP cuts to Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid?**](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/GP-Social-Security-Petition?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk274-su-in-nd")
| | [Sign the Petition](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/GP-Social-Security-Petition?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk274-su-in-nd")
---
Threatening to cut these programs is cruel and unacceptable. That's why I've set a goal to secure 10,000 signatures to this petition. **Can I count on you to stand shoulder to shoulder with millions of Americans who rely on these vital programs?****[Sign the petition to oppose GOP cuts to Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/GP-Social-Security-Petition?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk274-su-in-nd").**

Thank you,

Gary

| [To unsubscribe from the Peters for Michigan email list, please click here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da816/5721a3ed/70d06e3d/efb0299/4190867225/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da816/5721a3ed/70d06e3d/efb0297/4190867225/VEsA/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da816/5721a3ed/70d06e3d/efb0295/4190867225/VEsB/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/update-your-info") We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da816/5721a3ed/70d06e3d/efb0294/4190867225/VEsO/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe from our emails, click [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da816/5721a3ed/70d06e3d/efb0299/4190867225/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [Donate to Gary ->](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da816/5721a3ed/70d06e3d/efb0297/4190867225/VEsHBQ/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") |

name: sri2020.com
subject: how we win:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/m0HhD17A_UAtGuBImJsvIcjYSzILwbU-dFJimsqN9t8=/-JZsTnea7ddl4yehkUkD2pP4fvZfUrS-FHnKOoNxDNI=?refcode=20200213&amount=25&recurring=1)

Team,

We're hurtling toward the March 3rd primary, and we clearly still have a long road ahead of us!

We have a $15,000 online, grassroots fundraising goal set for this month, to ensure that our field team has what they need to have boots on the ground, knocking doors across Texas' 22nd district, and to get out the vote!

**[We're down to the wire - will you help us reach this goal by chipping in?](https://act.myngp.com/el/m0HhD17A_UAtGuBImJsvIcjYSzILwbU-dFJimsqN9t8=/-JZsTnea7ddl4yehkUkD2pP4fvZfUrS-FHnKOoNxDNI=?refcode=20200213&amount=25&recurring=1)**

Your dollars will ensure that we can get the word out about Sri's record and all that he's fighting for.

**[Sri doesn't accept corporate PAC money because he knows he serves voters and our communities, not corporations and special interests, so we need your support, team, to flip this district.](https://act.myngp.com/el/m0HhD17A_UAtGuBImJsvIcjYSzILwbU-dFJimsqN9t8=/-JZsTnea7ddl4yehkUkD2pP4fvZfUrS-FHnKOoNxDNI=?refcode=20200213&amount=25&recurring=1)**

In 2018, we came within 14,000 votes of flipping this district - closing a 30 point gap and surprising the pundits to put this race on the map for the first time.

_This time, we will flip this seat._

It's time to restore reason, compassion, and decency to Congress.

Thank you,

Team Sri

Now look, I'm not in a panic. But it does put us in danger of falling short on our goal when Trump and McConnell's dark money donor network is poised to ramp up their nasty attacks on Democratic candidates like me.
Political insiders say our campaign is the best shot Democrats have at flipping a Republican-held Senate seat. We have to keep up our momentum and hit our benchmarks if we're going to win this thing:

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I want to share a short story about the other night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I'm not done fighting for working people, for students, for anybody who feels squeezed by the way our economy is set up right now -- and who believes that we can make things better than they are now.. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852afa6/45c30650/1fec3ae17/66e54277/181476288/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
A lot of stories came out of the New Hampshire primary the other night, but I wanted to make sure that you knew about this one.

After I shared my speech, I stuck around to meet with supporters and I took selfies with them.

One young woman who I met with told me that she was a college student with thousands of dollars in debt -- and she only had $6 in her bank account.

Then she said that she still chipped in $3 to our campaign that night. Because that was how much this campaign meant to her.

I didn't take that lightly. Every single contribution -- no matter how much -- means a great deal to me and, more importantly, to our movement that's fighting for people who share stories like hers.

**I'm not done fighting for working people, for students, for anybody who feels squeezed by the way our economy is set up right now -- and who believes that we can make things better than they are now.**

**[I hope you're not done fighting either. If it makes sense for you to make a contribution right now, can you chip in $2 right now to power our campaign forward?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852afa6/45c30650/1fec3ae17/66e54279/181476288/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItanVuZTIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTzYyRl9FR1JfU1JZX0VfMjAyMDAyMTNfVjFTMl9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-june2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO62F_EGR_SRY_E_20200213_V1S2_P_T1")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852afa6/45c30650/1fec3ae17/66e54279/181476288/VEsEDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItanVuZTIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTzYyRl9FR1JfU1JZX0VfMjAyMDAyMTNfVjFTMl9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-june2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO62F_EGR_SRY_E_20200213_V1S2_P_T1")
---
>
The way I see it, getting involved in a political campaign is an act of optimism. It's about hope -- and about people who feel like they have power in their democracy.

Traditionally, the people who feel like they have power in democracy are the rich and powerful. Those who can afford to hand over a couple thousand dollar checks to a candidate running for office.

That's not who I'm running for. I've been focused on building a movement where students like the one I met the other night feel like they can make a real difference in their country.

Our campaign doesn't cater to wealthy donors who want to meet at a fancy fundraiser and talk about how we can pad the profits of their giant multinational corporation.

I'm fighting to build a government that works for everyone, not just the rich and powerful.

**[If that's the future you want to build, please make a contribution now to help make the big, structural change we need.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852afa6/45c30650/1fec3ae17/66e54279/181476288/VEsEDA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItanVuZTIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTzYyRl9FR1JfU1JZX0VfMjAyMDAyMTNfVjFTMl9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-june2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO62F_EGR_SRY_E_20200213_V1S2_P_T1")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

clean_body: I'm not done fighting for working people, for students, for anybody who feels squeezed by the way our economy is set up right now -- and who believes that we can make things better than they are now.. | | | "" A lot of stories came out of the New Hampshire primary the other night, but I wanted to make sure that you knew about this one. After I shared my speech, I stuck around to meet with supporters and I took selfies with them. One young woman who I met with told me that she was a college student with thousands of dollars in debt -- and she only had $6 in her bank account. Then she said that she still chipped in $3 to our campaign that night. Because that was how much this campaign meant to her. I didn't take that lightly. Every single contribution -- no matter how much -- means a great deal to me and, more importantly, to our movement that's fighting for people who share stories like hers. I'm not done fighting for working people, for students, for anybody who feels squeezed by the way our economy is set up right now -- and who believes that we can make things better than they are now. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" The way I see it, getting involved in a political campaign is an act of optimism. It's about hope -- and about people who feel like they have power in their democracy. Traditionally, the people who feel like they have power in democracy are the rich and powerful. Those who can afford to hand over a couple thousand dollar checks to a candidate running for office. That's not who I'm running for. I've been focused on building a movement where students like the one I met the other night feel like they can make a real difference in their country. Our campaign doesn't cater to wealthy donors who want to meet at a fancy fundraiser and talk about how we can pad the profits of their giant multinational corporation. I'm fighting to build a government that works for everyone, not just the rich and powerful. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2020 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Team Kennedy
subject: The Joe I Know | Trans Rights Activist Mimi Lemay

body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390336/55b66746/22df8d6f/80fe3b2/3523672394/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Hey, today we are launching our "Joe I Know" series with Trans Rights Activist Mimi Lemay. [**Watch the video, then share!**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390336/55b66746/22df8d6f/80fe3b3/3523672394/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://twitter.com/joekennedy/status/1227966909284372481?s=20") [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390336/55b66746/22df8d6f/80fe3b3/3523672394/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://twitter.com/joekennedy/status/1227966909284372481?s=20") [**CLICK HERE TO WATCH VIDEO**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390336/55b66746/22df8d6f/80fe3b3/3523672394/VEsC/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://twitter.com/joekennedy/status/1227966909284372481?s=20") Mimi's son Jacob transitioned when he was four years old, and Joe first sat with them to discuss their activism and experience in 2015. Together, they fought for state passage of transgender anti-discrimination protections in 2016 and to uphold those laws in 2018 in the historic 'Yes on 3' campaign, making Massachusetts the first state in U.S. history to successfully defend basic LGBTQIA+ protections at the ballot box. We are so grateful that Mimi shared her story with us. Thank you for watching. \- Team Kennedy | Joe is fighting for all Americans. No matter the god of your prayers, the color of your skin, the hand that you hold, how you identify - here, in America, on this campaign, you matter. You count.

[**Pitch in now to help fuel our campaign so we can win this primary. Every dollar makes a difference:**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390336/55b66746/22df8d6f/80fe3bc/3523672394/VEsD/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?recurring=1&refcode=2020-02-13-mimilemay")

| | The Senate orchestrated a complete and total cover-up of Donald Trump's abuse of power **The Senate orchestrated a complete and total cover-up of Donald Trump 's abuse of power** \-- and every single Republican who defended Trump or voted against impeachment or for acquittal is complicit in that cover-up. After calling impeachment **" a disgrace,"** Republican Steve Chabot took to Twitter to further cement his support of the president: [](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_feb?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200213_MQ2_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200213_MQ2_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200213_MQ2_U2_X1") President Trump's acquittal was a sad day for our democracy, and has put our country in serious danger -- **we 're now primed for further abuse of power from future presidents.** [**So we 're kicking our campaign to beat Chabot into overdrive -- will you chip in to help us hit our mid-quarter goal so we can take him down?**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_feb?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200213_MQ2_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+So+wersquore+kicking+our+campaign+to+bea&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200213_MQ2_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200213_MQ2_U2_X1") | | | [Chip in $25 >>](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_feb?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200213_MQ2_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=4+-+Chip+in+25+gtgt&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200213_MQ2_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200213_MQ2_U2_X1")

# Will you sign Jake's birthday card?
On Monday Jake is turning 32 and we're going to surprise him with a [birthday card](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f2f71c8884&e=1050d051da) from his family, friends, and supporters. We'd love to have you sign it!

You can quickly sign it [here](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=690e653535&e=1050d051da)! His birthday will be even more special with your name on his card!
---
| I also want to take this opportunity to share my gratitude with you. THANK YOU for your willingness to support Jake in his race for Congress. Your support means more than you'll ever know.

Sincerely,

Suzanne LaTurner

body:
Iowa needs a U.S. Senate candidate who can beat Sen. Ernst, be a leader in Washington, and stand up for Iowa. Also, we need a Senator who doesn't romance special interests and doesn't give the Preside
|
---
| |
---

| | Hi folks, Iowa needs a U.S. Senate candidate who can beat Sen. Ernst, be a leader in Washington, and stand up for Iowa. Also, we need a Senator who doesn't romance special interests and doesn't give the President a free pass. _[**Can you support our winning campaign for November? Every donation is appreciated and goes directly to getting Mike to the U.S. Senate.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24e4/33365068/4a6d2f8f/3f8be2a7/256626748/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200213_barr_em_fr_all_L1&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mfranken&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+support+our+winning+campaign+for&utm_campaign=FRA_20200213_barr_em_fr_all&source=FRA_20200213_barr_em_fr_all")_ | [Chip In >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24e4/33365068/4a6d2f8f/3f8be2a0/256626748/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200213_barr_em_fr_all_btn1&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mfranken&utm_content=2+-+Chip+In+gtgt&utm_campaign=FRA_20200213_barr_em_fr_all&source=FRA_20200213_barr_em_fr_all")
---
Speaking of Sen. Ernst, she again showed her lack of judgment and hollow leadership just this week. You did not hear a peep from her regarding the President tweeting about the sentencing of his convicted cronies. While the President interferes and the Attorney General kowtows, Senator Ernst stays silent. She is part of the problem.
**Not a word of outrage, not a mention of regret, nothing. Silence is acquiescence.**
_[**We need to beat her, and the Admiral is by far the best candidate to do that. Donate today, and we can put an end to this feckless representation.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24e4/33365068/4a6d2f8f/3f8be2a1/256626748/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200213_barr_em_fr_all_L2&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mfranken&utm_content=3+-+We+need+to+beat+her+and+the+Admiral+is+b&utm_campaign=FRA_20200213_barr_em_fr_all&source=FRA_20200213_barr_em_fr_all")_
[Chip In >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24e4/33365068/4a6d2f8f/3f8be2a2/256626748/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200213_barr_em_fr_all_btn2&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mfranken&utm_content=4+-+Chip+In+gtgt&utm_campaign=FRA_20200213_barr_em_fr_all&source=FRA_20200213_barr_em_fr_all")

Thank you,
Team Franken

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: It's time to fight back--here's why.
body:
We can win back the House. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5a4604e78177/calling-all-patriots-12166813?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=32aa3cf438&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=d5b306b3f3&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | Peter, We have a very narrow window of time.

The Democrats are utterly collapsed right now. Their primaries are a mess, their impeachment failed, and America is stronger and safer than ever under President Trump's leadership.

President Trump's acquittal is an opportunity to send the radical Democrat controlled House packing and give President Trump the support he needs to continue to deliver for the American people.

The Democrats are going to pour MILLIONS into this district in order to protect their so-called "moderate" Kendra Horn. But the people of Oklahoma's 5th district know now that she is no moderate, she's just another Pelosi rubber-stamp and we will defeat her in November.

But we can't underestimate how much of a fight it's going to be. National Journal has called this the #1 battleground district in the country. That is no joke and it shows you the monumental task ahead of us to flip it.

We need a battle-tested conservative who will draw a stark contrast with Kendra Horn's extremism. I'm ready to fight--like I always have--for everyday Oklahomans.

[**Will you join our fight to flip this district and give President Trump a House that supports his America-First agenda? Just $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 can make all the difference when it comes to powering our campaign.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=287cec54b7&e=795c6d9796)

If we don't strike while the iron is hot and flip this district then President Trump will have to govern with a radical obstructionist House in 2020. We cannot let that happen, the American people deserve the commonsense solutions that he and I are advancing.

[**Please help us fight Kendra Horn's liberal money machine by donating just a few dollars today. Thank you.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=4a79c145fa&e=795c6d9796)

Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=a12ab40b40&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi
---

name: Tom Steyer
subject: Reparations
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
We need a new narrative on race in America — especially when it comes to telling the truth about the African American experience, friend. Systemic racism — sanctioned by our government’s policies — has forced a disproportionate percentage of the African American population into poverty, incarceration, homelessness, and more. Our willful ignorance and refusal to acknowledge this bars us from bringing about substantive social change. As president, I will set up a formal commission on race to begin the retelling of the last 400 years of systematic racism against African Americans. It will focus on legal discrimination and institutionalized injustice and cruelty. We will also shine a light upon the moral leadership that the African American community has contributed, as well as the countless achievements in the arts, commerce, science, and more. Being more truthful and complete will lead to more effective policies that address systemic inequities. **The African American experience is not confined to the past; it’s right now, and it’s our future. ** **And this future must include reparations —[ _add your name if you agree that we need a formal inquiry into reparations._](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=M5l2K6CF-2BTeSi2jZtEX6WDq0JgL4SZ9fws6CW-2B-2BU1P2L1rVPgqBYKgbfcWTgnWgdYnaE4xYHKoy44Gk229IZFsH0IYb3e6VCtxPaZFQaTftYdnW6EZ87vy1doq4vlTkTHfizFfm1-2BwpC81XvwqhMDUso3BHW31EyYjn-2FTV37sc16l3c7Zb2a8gmnMuyQcTJNHGKHXktLmVZYM965yztx5UHDwFBvGQFDiVI8TGBMu3M-3DAkgS_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjI06VISPfJIPkjxFld-2BrrlsLfWBgSznyC9eEQeuE67ByW7-2F4rW5t238CYEo3QD0YeczJkDFt-2FvB7oeGJRcZwMgu-2BsMJJKfz58RtDeXGSobDpx85Go-2FZjRE7HdxtU7iKVcwwll6RSxlaHxDSbvN3BK3nICHYrxsb-2FbbRWWtL9f1okQDb2gGhZZXc83FkQGx3oaj5TpEBeUgZzQgED226hF50VbV6vPmxQ8oJ6MKIIDurysWv7RYcx2j1e-2BCBWlQ7YxIVXAIFi4Rwsns6oBgrFRDv2f35iJHW8CWmgIfpUdiIQHG2nZpY54uYSXwLKCfn3IuQRFfTQpB-2FFvmxIWAcFVqtcgLQq6zdH6wxssaOX3-2BEmmqqSd7g00Ve74sWtl3vEGPLWSleNpdhfVkD6yh6mmV)** For too long, our society has claimed that we’ve moved on from an era of racial injustice to a “post-racial America,” yet we still tolerate racist policies that ignore and perpetuate gross inequality. We justify it by claiming “fairness” and saying that we can’t have rules that are different for different people, but we’re where we are today because we _do have_ rules that are different for different people. We must recognize the egregious injustices and ensure equality, justice, and opportunity for every American. In reflection,
---
---
Tom
---
|
---

clean_body: | | | | We need a new narrative on race in America — especially when it comes to telling the truth about the African American experience, friend. Systemic racism — sanctioned by our government’s policies — has forced a disproportionate percentage of the African American population into poverty, incarceration, homelessness, and more. Our willful ignorance and refusal to acknowledge this bars us from bringing about substantive social change. As president, I will set up a formal commission on race to begin the retelling of the last 400 years of systematic racism against African Americans. It will focus on legal discrimination and institutionalized injustice and cruelty. We will also shine a light upon the moral leadership that the African American community has contributed, as well as the countless achievements in the arts, commerce, science, and more. Being more truthful and complete will lead to more effective policies that address systemic inequities. The African American experience is not confined to the past; it’s right now, and it’s our future. And this future must include reparations — For too long, our society has claimed that we’ve moved on from an era of racial injustice to a “post-racial America,” yet we still tolerate racist policies that ignore and perpetuate gross inequality. We justify it by claiming “fairness” and saying that we can’t have rules that are different for different people, but we’re where we are today because we do have rules that are different for different people. We must recognize the egregious injustices and ensure equality, justice, and opportunity for every American. In reflection, Tom | To learn more about Tom’s policies on key issues and addressing racial inequity, use the links below and add your name to show support: * | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! | | Hey Peter,

When Texas voters get to know me and hear our platform of acting on climate change, ending gun violence, and protecting health care, they want to support this grassroots campaign -- **but Texas is a big state.** I've traveled tens of thousands of miles and met thousands of Texans so far, but we want to make sure every voter learns about our campaign before the primary, that's why we're launching a new TV ad to meet voters where they are. **[Can you chip in to fund our ad?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905d0/7f51f7bc/4d385669/4ef1b3a6/3736132845/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkxOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txairwavesfund?refcode=email_20200213.2nd__919__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Our new ad helps explain why, as a veteran and mom, things like quality health care, fighting climate change, and ending family separation at our border are so important to me. (And my kids are in it, so I think it's pretty cute too.)

But ads are expensive, and they require a sustained investment, especially in a state as big as Texas. **[That's why I'm asking you to chip in to our Texas Airwaves Fund to make sure we can keep our new ad running >>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905d0/7f51f7bc/4d385669/4ef1b3a6/3736132845/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkxOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txairwavesfund?refcode=email_20200213.2nd__919__&amount=10&recurring=true")** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

I know it's going to be TOUGH for a political outsider to beat an eighteen-year incumbent senator who has spent his time in Washington currying favor with the DC establishment instead of serving Texans. But I've taken on a lot of tough fights in my life, and that's why I know I can win this one.

Unlike Senator Cornyn, I'm not taking corporate PAC money -- I'm relying on this grassroots team every step of the way. But with early voting just days away, we're running out of time. **[Can you chip in to make sure we can keep our ad running? Even $5 can make a big difference.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905d0/7f51f7bc/4d385669/4ef1b3a6/3736132845/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkxOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-txairwavesfund?refcode=email_20200213.2nd__919__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

MJ Hegar

clean_body: | "" | | Hey Peter, When Texas voters get to know me and hear our platform of acting on climate change, ending gun violence, and protecting health care, they want to support this grassroots campaign -- but Texas is a big state. I've traveled tens of thousands of miles and met thousands of Texans so far, but we want to make sure every voter learns about our campaign before the primary, that's why we're launching a new TV ad to meet voters where they are. "" Our new ad helps explain why, as a veteran and mom, things like quality health care, fighting climate change, and ending family separation at our border are so important to me. (And my kids are in it, so I think it's pretty cute too.) But ads are expensive, and they require a sustained investment, especially in a state as big as Texas. "" | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" I know it's going to be TOUGH for a political outsider to beat an eighteen-year incumbent senator who has spent his time in Washington currying favor with the DC establishment instead of serving Texans. But I've taken on a lot of tough fights in my life, and that's why I know I can win this one. Unlike Senator Cornyn, I'm not taking corporate PAC money -- I'm relying on this grassroots team every step of the way. But with early voting just days away, we're running out of time. "" Thanks for all that you do, MJ Hegar "" | MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. body:
The people who keep our communities safe are backing us. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1f5936421354/im-running-for-texas-house-12199685?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=a2ee88cd4a&e=4f010155df)
---
| Peter, Our campaign has an exciting new announcement to make. The Dallas Police Association has endorsed our campaign to take back HD 113 for Republicans and conservatives in 2020!

The Dallas Police Association is made up of the thousands of men and women in blue who keep our communities safe and thriving. Rule of Law is critical to Texas' prosperity and I couldn't be more grateful to have their endorsement.

Here's what Mike Mata, the Dallas Police Association President had to say about our campaign:
---
| | "His commitment to putting public safety first makes Will Douglas the best choice for the voters of District 113. He will focus on passing the common sense and pro-law enforcement policies that will lead to a safer Texas."
---
| I'm honored to have DPA's endorsement and look forward to working with them to keep the residents of HD 113 and all of Texas safe and free. The commonsense citizens of our district know that Rhetta Bowers has the wrong approach to criminal justice and they WILL vote her out in 2020.

[**Please consider donating just $5**](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=292cbae675&e=4f010155df) to help defeat Rhetta in 2020 and don't forget to follow us on [**Facebook**](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=8d8de673ac&e=4f010155df), [**Twitter**](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=3b537e7200&e=4f010155df), and [**Instagram**](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=507fed11d8&e=4f010155df) to keep up to date with our activities on the trail!

Thank you for helping us fight for Texas and Freedom.

For Texas,
[](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=9e459e5db7&e=4f010155df)
Will Douglas

name: Trump Alert!
subject: Trump Budget Cuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
| | **Breaking from The New York Times: "Trump's $4.8 Trillion Budget Would Cut Safety Net Programs and Boost Defense"**
---
**Tell us before midnight:
Does Donald Trump deserve a second term?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MTY5NTgyMTYS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDg0NDIwNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTY5NTgyMTYS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDg0NDIwNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Team, since Donald Trump took office, he's done everything he can to lower taxes for the rich and gut critical programs for everyone else.
Earlier this week, Trump rolled out his new budget - cruelly _slashing_ tens of BILLIONS from critical programs that people depend on like food stamps, education, Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security. **If Trump gets his budget passed, hundreds of thousands of children, seniors and working people would be without health care or food - all to keep lining the pockets of his wealthy donors by extending tax cuts for the rich. **
This new budget is just the latest example of why 6 in 10 Americans believe Trump does NOT deserve a second term. To avoid these dangerous cuts and more, we MUST make Trump a one-term president. Do you agree?

**We need 26 grassroots Democrats in 34223 to tell us what they think before midnight:**
| | **Does Donald Trump deserve a second term?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MTY5NTgyMTYS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDg0NDIwNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTY5NTgyMTYS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDg0NDIwNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

---

| **Here to Serve!**
---
| | | | | | Friends,

I need to share something that’s not only extremely important to me, it’s important to every Montanan. We are at risk of losing an important seat, State Auditor, along with one of the five land board seats. We need to elect the only candidate in the June primary election who can defeat the democrat in November, Troy Downing.

Troy is the only candidate for Auditor, the Commissioner of Securities and Insurance, that has built both insurance and securities companies from the ground up. He is passionate about our State Lands. He is not a career politician, he’s a man of service and he’s here to serve again.

Troy stepped up to the plate after 9/11 and went to war to fight for your freedom, now he’s stepping up again to protect it.
---
| [Contribute to Troy Downing](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=abb5904bb2&e=a212bb87cc "Contribute to Troy Downing")
---

Please donate now... stand up and fight alongside Troy.

Thank you,
-Heather

name: Team Tina
subject: Tina packed her bags and moved to Minnesota in her beat-up orange car
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200213-car?refcode=em200213-car&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend,

In 1984, Tina packed her bags and moved to Minnesota in her beat-up orange car. She got a job at General Mills -- which led Tina to later start her own business and, eventually, to Planned Parenthood, where she fought for women and families.

A few years later, Tina was elected Lieutenant Governor of our great state and went on to serve as your U.S. Senator -- standing up for what's right and working hard to move good ideas forward in Washington.

The bottom line is this: Tina loves Minnesota. She has met people from all walks of life with different opinions about pretty much everything, but share a common thread: Even if they disagree, Minnesotans are willing to respect each others' opinions and work together to get things done.

That's what is so great about our state and our campaign. Tina has met with folks in every corner of Minnesota to hear about what's impacting people's lives, carry their voices back to Washington, and work with them to solve the problems they face.

But if we want to help Tina continue doing her job and fighting for us in the Senate, she'll need your support to do so. So, here's the part where we ask:

**Will you add a contribution of whatever you can afford to our re-election campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota before the first mid-quarter deadline of the year? Anything you can give would mean the world to Tina.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200213-car?refcode=em200213-car&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

name: survey@markwarnerva.com
subject: Giuliani is STILL at it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
He is still trying to dig up dirt on Donald Trump's political opponents in Ukraine, even though two of his henchmen have already been indicted.
|
---
| | **Is Attorney General Barr
enabling a sham investigation?
[Take the survey >>](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d604/53d9897e/536b1bac/1c89b9ec/2350205267/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-giuliani")** Derek --

**Rudy Giuliani is _still_ trying to dig up dirt on Donald Trump's political opponents in Ukraine, even though two of his henchmen have already been indicted.** His wild conspiracy theories have been thoroughly debunked, but he insists that any day now he's going to turn over evidence that a political opponent "committed a very serious crime."

What's worse: the Department of Justice continues to lend credibility to Giuliani's nonsense "investigation." On Monday, **Attorney General Barr said that the DOJ welcomed any information Giuliani had from Ukraine about a political opponent.

What do you think about Barr welcoming Giuliani's "evidence?" [Take Mark's short survey now to let us know.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d604/53d9897e/536b1bac/1c89b9ec/2350205267/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-giuliani")**

It's been clear for a while that Barr doesn't stand for justice -- and that his loyalty is to Donald Trump, not the U.S. Constitution. Now, he's taking it to another level by legitimizing Giuliani's sham investigation. He tried to excuse his acceptance of dirt on a political opponent by saying that the Department of Justice keeps "an open door to anybody" who wants to give them information. That's simply not true -- this is a special process for a friend of the president.

What do you think of Barr legitimizing Giuliani's conspiracy theory chase through Ukraine? **[Will you share your thoughts in this short survey?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d604/53d9897e/536b1bac/1c89b9ec/2350205267/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-giuliani")**

Thank you so much,

The Warner Survey Team | ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d604/53d9897e/536b1bac/1c89b9eb/2350205267/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ3MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200213db__473__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")****

"" Derek -- Rudy Giuliani is still trying to dig up dirt on Donald Trump's political opponents in Ukraine, even though two of his henchmen have already been indicted. His wild conspiracy theories have been thoroughly debunked, but he insists that any day now he's going to turn over evidence that a political opponent "committed a very serious crime." What's worse: the Department of Justice continues to lend credibility to Giuliani's nonsense "investigation." On Monday, Attorney General Barr said that the DOJ welcomed any information Giuliani had from Ukraine about a political opponent. What do you think about Barr welcoming Giuliani's "evidence?" "" It's been clear for a while that Barr doesn't stand for justice -- and that his loyalty is to Donald Trump, not the U.S. Constitution. Now, he's taking it to another level by legitimizing Giuliani's sham investigation. He tried to excuse his acceptance of dirt on a political opponent by saying that the Department of Justice keeps "an open door to anybody" who wants to give them information. That's simply not true -- this is a special process for a friend of the president. What do you think of Barr legitimizing Giuliani's conspiracy theory chase through Ukraine? "" Thank you so much, The Warner Survey Team | ** ""** | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

subject: WATCH: First Lady hosts movie night for local students
body:
Popcorn in hand, students from Cornerstone Schools of Washington, DC, joined First Lady Melania Trump at the White House theater... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5d31b4494b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • February 13, 2020
---
| | |
# **WATCH: First Lady hosts movie night for local students **
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dfc7ba5e5e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Popcorn in hand, **students from Cornerstone Schools of Washington, DC, joined First Lady Melania Trump at the White House Family Theater _** **_ to watch an inspirational film.

**“We celebrated Black History Month** at the White House last week watching the movie ‘Hidden Figures.’ It was fantastic to host Cornerstone Schools and reflect on many important moments in history,” the First Lady wrote on Twitter.

**“Hidden Figures”** depicts the vital role African-American women have played in the NASA space program. Before starting the film, the First Lady invited Deborah Tulani Salahu-Din, an expert with the National Museum of African-American History and Culture, to discuss the topic with students.

[Read President Trump’s Proclamation for African-American History Month!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d53d1ed780&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE** : [Learn about the First Lady’s “Be Best” initiative](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9e4be0d738&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump applauds Ecuador’s turn from socialism**

**Yesterday,** **President Trump** and the First Lady welcomed President Lenín Moreno Garcés and First Lady Rocío González _** **_ de Moreno of Ecuador to the White House.

**The meeting signaled** a historic turn in relations between the two countries. President Trump celebrated President Moreno’s efforts to peacefully transition Ecuador away from “21st century socialism” and toward a democratic society with a free-market economy.

[America is rebuilding relationships around the globe–including with Ecuador!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=25e6fcad05&e=3ee4985eea)

**A strong, free Ecuador** is a powerful partner for the United States in South America. “We are working on trade deals, we’re working on military options, including the purchase of a lot of our military equipment,” President Trump said. “And we’re negotiating some very important pacts between Ecuador and the United States.”

**One issue** near the top of President Trump’s agenda: Venezuela. He and President Moreno discussed support for Venezuelan Interim President Juan Guaidó and agreed on the importance of growing international pressure on the illegitimate Nicolas Maduro regime. The goal is to end the crisis, restore democracy, and protect human rights.

**“It’s always** **close** to our heart,” President Trump said on the Venezuelan situation.

**🎬** [Watch President Trump meet with Ecuador’s President in the Oval Office](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=85f3f24f12&e=3ee4985eea)

**READ** : [Joint statement by President Trump and President Moreno](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b91cfa1587&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Our constitutional duty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

Today, the Senate passed our bipartisan war powers resolution to prevent further escalation of hostilities with Iran without congressional authorization by a vote of 55-45. I was proud to sponsor this legislation, and I consider it one of the most necessary and important things we can do in the Senate. As the father of a Marine and as a Senator from a state full of active duty servicemembers, reservists, veterans, and military families of all kinds, matters of war and peace are very personal to me. While working on this legislation, I often reflected on how long and broad the list of war's consequences is. Every time I visit a VA hospital, or speak with our young people who are looking ahead to our country's future -- like my guest at this year's State of the Union, JROTC Cadet Nicole Rosario-Flores -- I am reminded that those who serve risk everything. It would be deeply unfair to them to allow perpetual war to continue on autopilot. With that in mind, our resolution said: _no war unless you come and make the case to Congress first._ By passing this bipartisan bill, we've sent a very powerful message to the American public -- including our troops and their families -- that before we get into a war, there will be careful deliberation about whether it's necessary. And by sending it to the President's desk, we are sending him an equally powerful message from the Senate that we will uphold our constitutional duty to deliberate and vote before sending our troops into harm's way. I'm grateful that a bipartisan majority of Senators affirmed this important proposition, and I am grateful for your support along the way as we work to pass legislation that will protect our troops and reassure the American people. Thank you, -Tim
